title: Shiva
subTitle: Shiva is a brave and intelligent child who stays with his grandparents in Vedas City. He sets out with his gang of friends to save the citizens from all sorts of evil.

title: Pak Pakau
subTitle: Follow the whimsical and absurd conversations of two friends and learn new things as they navigate life's everyday mysteries.

title: Pakdam Pakdai
subTitle: There is a constant war between Doggy Don and the three clever mice who live in his house. However, with the help of Doggy Don's brother, an ex-army dog, they fight the mice to win back their house.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: A group of six rescue dogs, led by a tech-savvy boy named Ryder, have come together to form a pack. Together they embark on adventures and work as a team in order to protect the community.
